__fixture_tag__: SAMPLE FIXTURE — not real data, for selftest replay only
__source__: NOMAD V1 entry schema (illustrative); real fetch via REST API at https://nomad-lab.eu/prod/v1/api/v1/entries/<entry_id>
__honest_note__: NOMAD is a FAIR-data repository for computational materials science (Draxl & Scheffler 2018 MRS Bull. 43, 676; Draxl & Scheffler 2019 J. Phys. Mater. 2, 036001). Aggregates 19M+ DFT calculations from VASP / Quantum ESPRESSO / FHI-aims / ABINIT / CP2K / GPAW / SIESTA / Exciting / WIEN2k / CASTEP and many other codes. Records are PREDICTIONS — not measurements. NOMAD does NOT curate synthesis status.

publication.primary: Draxl & Scheffler 2018 MRS Bull. 43, 676 — NOMAD: The FAIR concept for big data-driven materials science
publication.secondary: Draxl & Scheffler 2019 J. Phys. Mater. 2, 036001 — The NOMAD laboratory: from data sharing to artificial intelligence

license: CC-BY 4.0 (NOMAD data policy; https://nomad-lab.eu/nomad-lab/services-uploads.html; citation required to Draxl & Scheffler 2018)
verdict: PREDICTION (DFT via VASP-PBE, originating code preserved), not measurement
